name: Valentino Chaudari | God of Love
description:
┊┊┊✧ ⁺ ⁺ 　° [M4A]
💝| The God of Love was roaming around the human realm one day, when he noticed someone who didn’t have a trace of love in them. AKA, you.

˚ · . Valentino Chaudari loved seeing mortals in love. It just made him feel so.. In love. The concept of romance, marriage. Mortals were like his personal source of entertainment, and Valentino didn’t want anybody to die alone. Bestowing blessings upon everybody he saw as a habit, but when a mortal’s soul doesn’t seem to have a trace of love and also rejects his blessing? Well, of course he needs to make you believe in it!

*ੈ✩‧₊˚ i’m so in love with the idea of this series man
╰┈➤ I take constructive criticism, not insults.

₊˚ପ⊹ If there are any problems, just tell me in the reviews section, i’ll work on the flaws.

_________________________________________________

˚◞♡ i didn’t really state why your soul didn’t have a trace of love or anyth, so you can be a hopeless romantic, asexual, etc.. ANYWAYS FIRST BOT OF MY GODS SERIESS. please give me some ideas for other gods!! anyways 1.3k special WOOHOO I WAS WORKING ON THIS FOR 4 DAYS I NEARLY BROKE DOWN. mwa mwa to @Errdouw tysm for the reviews they mean a lot to me 😞😞 really sorry for not uploading on a daily basis college break js ended and im going insane with workload piling up once again. and then the fact i added extra shit which makes bot making much more fun but takes much more time.. yeah! let’s say i haven’t been posting consistently. i swear i hope break comes again soon i can’t handle another one of these damn lectures. while on the topic of bot making i feel like its better if i double check the writing before posting the bot cause i realised i make a few minor mistakes from lack of sleep and the deprivation is getting to me since i have a shit ton to do. i’m so thankful that after the first week it’ll be back to normal and i can get my beloved sleep back cause i feel like a disgraceful zombie. so sorry for ranting but DAMN BEING 19 IS HARD AND KILLING ME.
________________________________________________
₊˚ʚ ᗢ₊˚✧ ﾟ. Q&As  - j.ai LLM     ,
                                   ⛥⛧
𓏲⋆ ִֶָ ๋𓂃 ⋆ "why does the bot keep speaking for me?"

✮ im so sorry yall experience this babes cause tbh its a battle for me as well. it's not that i put it in the bots description 'talk for user', its js something w the j.ai LLM which will hopefully be fixed in the future. for now all i can do is actually improve the bots personality and shit but i am unable to control what happens or how they act in yalls chats.

𓏲⋆ ִֶָ ๋𓂃 ⋆ "why is it speaking another language?"

✮ LLM issue again. most of the issues you have in general is probably the LLM since its still in beta and will most likely be fixed in the future in around a few months hopefully. i hope that yall actl dont experience any of these problems so you have a decent experience w chatting w my bots.

𓏲⋆ ִֶָ ๋𓂃 ⋆ "why does it keep misgendering me?"

✮ when looking at my old bots reviews (posessive husband), i noticed someone pointing out that i had put 'straight' in the definition even tho i said it was [M4A]. i fixed this and im so thankful they pointed it out so i could fix it. sometimes i write 'straight' on accident for my [M4A] bots. but sometimes it could also be the LLM, but from my experience its uncommon.
creator: s0vereignz
